entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area of land.

entities.description: Agricultural regions that rely solely or primarily on rainfall for water.

entities.name: INDIA

entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics.

entities.name: POPULATION
entities.description: The number of people residing in a specific area, creating pressure on resources.

entities.name: LAND RESOURCES
entities.description: The available land used for agricultural production.

entities.name: WEATHER
entities.description: Atmospheric conditions that influence agricultural outcomes.

entities.name: FOOD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of generating food for consumption.

entities.name: IRRIGATED AREAS
entities.description: Agricultural regions where water is supplied artificially.

entities.name: FOODGRAINS
entities.description: Cereal crops harvested for their edible grains.

entities.name: INPUT-RESPONSIVE SEEDS
entities.description: Seeds designed to respond positively to added inputs like fertilizers.

entities.name: FERTILIZERS

entities.name: SOIL MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of maintaining soil health and productivity.

entities.name: RAINFALL

entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEMS

entities.name: SUPPLEMENTARY IRRIGATION

entities.name: WATER HARVESTING
entities.description: The collection and storage of rainwater for agricultural use.

entities.name: PACKAGES OF PRACTICES
entities.description: A comprehensive set of recommended agricultural techniques.

entities.name: MODERN AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The application of science and technology to farming.
